voice.personality: speaks to athletes, coaches, parents, journalists, fans, admins, and sponsors simultaneously — each with their own language
do: Acknowledge the full 7-role ecosystem: Athlete, Coach, Parent, Journalist/Photographer, Fan, Admin, Sponsor
Frame MySports as the hub that connects every role in youth and amateur sports
Age-aware: sponsorship messaging routes to parent/coach for athletes under 15
dont: Never market to under-15 athletes directly with sponsorship content
Don't overpromise — it's a platform, not a recruiting tool
sample_phrases: Seven roles. One platform. Every game.
The athlete trains. The coach guides. The parent supports. MySports connects them all.
Your sports story deserves an audience.
From the field to the front office — MySports.

aida.attention_hook: the fragmentation problem in youth sports — everyone uses different apps
aida.interest: MySports as the single platform that serves all 7 roles in the sports ecosystem
aida.desire: a family/team/community that's actually connected across every touchpoint
aida.action: visit MySports / join your role / get early access
